title: Resolve merge conflict with priority
system: You are a senior TypeScript developer. Always export your functions. Never add comments to code.
user:
Create and export a function `resolveMergeConflict` that resolves a merge conflict using priority.

Priority (highest to lowest):
1. localUnconfirmed
2. serverConfirmed
3. serverDefault

Requirements:
1. Function signature: `export function resolveMergeConflict<T>(options: { localUnconfirmed: T | null; serverConfirmed: T | null; serverDefault: T | null }): T | null`
2. Return the first non-null value in priority order
3. Return null if all are null

Only output the function code. Make sure to use `export` keyword.
